footer_bio: Full Stack Developer building modern web applications with React, Node.js, MongoDB, Prisma, and more. Passionate about clean code, real-time applications, and great user experiences.
hero_tagline: Building full-stack applications with React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Prisma. Passionate about real-time apps, e-commerce platforms, and clean architecture.
about_bio_p1: I'm a full-stack developer specializing in the MERN stack — React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB — along with Prisma ORM and Socket.io for real-time applications. I build scalable web applications with clean, maintainable code, and I'm passionate about delivering exceptional user experiences.
about_bio_p2: My GitHub portfolio showcases a range of projects from real-time chat applications and e-commerce platforms to quiz games and RESTful APIs. I'm constantly exploring new technologies and improving my craft, with a focus on TypeScript, database design, and system architecture.
